    for _ in range(max_iterations):
        gradient = approximate_gradient(function, current_point, precision)
        new_point = [current_point[i] - learning_rate * gradient[i] for i in range(len(current_point))]

def approximate_gradient(function, point, precision):
    gradient = []
    for i in range(len(point)):
        point_plus_epsilon = point.copy()
        point_plus_epsilon[i] += precision
        point_minus_epsilon = point.copy()
        point_minus_epsilon[i] -= precision
        gradient.append((function(point_plus_epsilon) - function(point_minus_epsilon)) / (2 * precision))
    return gradient

        for i in range(len(x)):

    m = 0
    b = 0
    for _ in range(iterations):
        y_pred = [m * xi + b for xi in x]
        error = [yi - yi_pred for yi, yi_pred in zip(y, y_pred)]
        m_derivative = sum([xi * ei for xi, ei in zip(x, error)]) / len(x)

    return m, b
